languages.text: {n}Себериан обладает превосходной реакцией, несмотря на кажущуюся грузность. В мгновение ока его меч устремляется навстречу вашему удару, со свистом рассекая воздух.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Себериан, несмотря на грузный вид, оказывается быстер. В мгновение ока его меч вспарывает воздух и устремляется навстречу вашему удару.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан обладает превосходной реакцией, несмотря на кажущуюся грузность. В мгновение ока его меч устремляется навстречу вашему удару, со свистом рассекая воздух.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}
{n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}
{n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

languages.text: {n}尽管体态笨重，塞贝里安的反应却异常迅捷。转瞬之间，他的利刃已迎上你的攻击，破空而来。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}尽管体态笨重，塞贝里安的反应却异常迅捷。转瞬之间，他的利刃已迎上你的攻击，破空而来。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les réflexes de Seberian sont excellents, malgré sa taille imposante. En moins d'une seconde, sa lame fend l'air pour arrêter votre coup.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les réflexes de Seberian sont excellents, malgré sa taille imposante. En moins d'une seconde, sa lame fend l'air pour arrêter votre coup.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian tiene unos reflejos excelentes pese a su tamaño. En un abrir y cerrar de ojos, su espada atraviesa el aire para parar tu golpe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian tiene unos reflejos excelentes pese a su tamaño. En un abrir y cerrar de ojos, su espada atraviesa el aire para parar tu golpe.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian'ın görünürdeki hantallığına rağmen refleksleri mükemmel. Göz açıp kapayıncaya dek kılıcı, saldırını karşılamak üzere havada ıslık çalarak fırlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian'ın görünürdeki hantallığına rağmen refleksleri mükemmel. Göz açıp kapayıncaya dek kılıcı, saldırını karşılamak üzere havada ıslık çalarak fırlıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seberian hat trotz seiner stattlichen Größe hervorragende Reflexe. Im Bruchteil einer Sekunde fährt sein Schwert zischend durch die Luft, um deinen Hieb abzuwehren.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hat trotz seiner stattlichen Größe hervorragende Reflexe. Im Bruchteil einer Sekunde fährt sein Schwert zischend durch die Luft, um deinen Hieb abzuwehren.{/n}

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは、見た目とは裏腹に、反射神経が非常に優れている。一瞬のうちに、彼の剣は空を裂き、あなたの攻撃に襲いかかる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian has excellent reflexes, despite his apparent bulk. In the blink of an eye, his sword rushes to meet your strike, whistling through the air.{/n}
